trade_name: SOLAR PHOTOVOLTAIC SYSTEM INSTALLATION AND MAINTENANCE

learning_outcomes.description: Know safe working Practices and Instructions

performance_criteria.description: Describe safe work practice and instructions
Recognize safety signs and symbols
Interpret safety signs and symbols correctly.
Observe safe work practices on given tasks
Work in accordance with health and safety best practices

learning_outcomes.description: Know Safety, Hazards and risks in work place

performance_criteria.description: Identify types of hazards in the work environment
Describe ways to avoid common hazards in the work place
State methods of how to reduce the risk of hazards in the work place
Describe how to report potential hazards in the work place

learning_outcomes.description: Know the appropriate actions to take during accident/injuries OBJECTIVE (LO)

performance_criteria.description: Identify basic first aid equipment.
Explain the benefits of first aid equipment
State types of injuries commonly found in the workplace.
Identify serious injuries that require emergency response in the work place.
State the steps to be taken following an accident

Identify own responsibilities in case of an emergency such as: • Identifying and switching off power supply sources • Carrying out artificial resuscitation methods • Calling for medical attention • Transferring patient to the nearest medical facility
Identify muster point
Identify locations of fire Ref. Page extinguishers in case of fire outbreak
Describe methods of fire fighting
Describe the Pull Aim Squeeze and Sweep (PASS) of fire extinguishers
Describe how to treat minor injuries and burns

learning_outcomes.description: Know safe work practices and clean work environment

performance_criteria.description: Identify safe access and exit routes in the work environment
Describe safe work practices and clean work environment
Dispose all wastes appropriately in designated waste facilities
State the advantages of using appropriate PPE while carrying out a task in work environment
Select appropriate working tools for a given task to avoid hazards

learning_outcomes.description: Understand the importance of good communication skills

performance_criteria.description: State reasons why good communication skills is important in Solar PV Systems.
List ways to communicate effectively: • Upward • Downward • Horizontal
Explain the significance of patience and a mild demeanor while communicating with colleagues and clients
Describe how to communicate in a professional manner.
State the need for respectful body language even when in a bad mood or while under pressure.

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to follow documented instructions

performance_criteria.description: Read and accurately follow steps in installation manuals.
Explain mobile app documentation.
Read the information displayed on various solar devices.

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to document information after commissioning of solar system

performance_criteria.description: Determine parameters to be documented
Describe the scope of information needed to be documented.
Explain the importance of the documented information.

learning_outcomes.description: Know Positive working relationship with colleagues in the work environment

performance_criteria.description: Explain the need for developing positive working relationship with colleagues in the work environment.
Explain the importance of relating with other people in a way that makes them feel valued and respected.
Assist team members when one’s services are requested.
Report to the authorized personnel when request is made for assistance falling outside one’s area of responsibility.
Communicate information to colleagues about own work that might affect performance of others

learning_outcomes.description: Know the responsibilities within the team

performance_criteria.description: Explain own role and responsibilities within the team for a group work.
Carry out individual tasks in a given group assignment in line with the team’s rules and regulations.
Participate actively in a given team work.
Give own report of task carried out in a team.

learning_outcomes.description: Know policies and regulations of organization

performance_criteria.description: Carry out assigned tasks in a team in line with organizational standards
Use organizational code of practice for assigned job within a team.
Obtain organizational code of conduct for own and team jobs.
Explain the importance of using organizational code of conduct for own and team jobs
List rules that guide the activities of the team
Report activities of the team work that may affect organizational code of conduct to the higher authority.

units.title: Basic Electrical Calculations of Solar PV

learning_outcomes.description: Know the calculations used in Solar PV Systems

performance_criteria.description: Explain types of circuits connections
Explain electrical current parameters use in Solar PV
Define the Ohm’s Law formulae
Calculate the total voltage in a parallel, series and combination of circuits.
Calculate the total current in a parallel, series and combination of circuits.
Calculate the total resistance in a parallel, series and combination of circuits.
Determine the total power in a parallel, series and combination of circuits
Determine the total energy in a parallel, series and combination of circuits
Record calculations in accordance with laid down procedures.

learning_outcomes.description: Know the appropriate measuring Instruments in solar PV system installation and maintenance.

performance_criteria.description: List the measuring instruments used in Solar PV Systems
Explain the uses of different measuring instruments used in Solar PV Systems
Select appropriate measuring instruments for a given task
Use appropriate instruments to measure electric current in a circuit
Use appropriate instruments to measure voltage in a circuit
Use appropriate instruments to measure resistance in a circuit
Use appropriate instruments to measure electric energy in a circuit
Determine the state of charge of a battery using appropriate instruments

learning_outcomes.description: Know geometrical measurement and (LO) calculations in preparation for installation

performance_criteria.description: Explain measurements requirements in preparation for a specific task. Ref. Page
Determine space requirement for installation of Solar panels
Explain how to calculate number of panels required for a particular Solar project

learning_outcomes.description: Know the Pre- installation of Solar panel racks

performance_criteria.description: Describe the structural condition of the mounting area
Identify the mounting system to be deployed
Select mounting system compatible to the rack

Identify and select appropriate PPE for the installation of solar panel racks

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to Position and Install Solar Panel Rack

performance_criteria.description: Identify the location of a panel rack
Identify “true south‟ and find optimum tilt angle of the rack
Identify jacking points and safety measures used in solar rack installation
Perform rack installation according to standard specifications
Apply safety and environmental standards in selecting and installation of solar panel racks

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to review the completion of solar PV installation rack

performance_criteria.description: Carry out checks to ensure work is following plans/drawings /instructions and requirements
Notify Supervisor upon completion of work
Clean tools, equipment and as well any excess materials and return to storage in accordance with established safety procedures
Clean the work area

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to Prepare to install Solar PV modules

performance_criteria.description: Explain the difference between monocrystalline, poly crystalline and thin-film Solar PV module
Select the appropriate Solar PV modules
Select appropriate tools, equipment and materials according to specifications and guidelines
Select appropriate PPE for the installation of solar PV modules

learning_outcomes.description: Know the installation of solar PV modules

performance_criteria.description: Determine the appropriate orientation for installation of solar PV modules
Perform PV modules installation according to specifications and guidelines
Apply safety and environmental standards in installation of solar PV module

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to Communicate information regarding the panel installation

performance_criteria.description: Identify specific information on installed solar PV panels
Apply appropriate medium in transfer of information
Convey information clearly and concisely

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to prepare and install charge controllers in Solar PV Systems.

performance_criteria.description: Explain the difference between MPPT and PWM charge controllers
State the appropriate ratings of charge controllers to battery size and PV module power output design to be installed
Distinguish between rating of charge controllers
Interpret rating of charge controller
Explain the connection sequence of charge controllers.
State precautionary measures to be taken in installing charge controllers
List the steps involved in the connection of charge controller

learning_outcomes.description: Install charge controller in Solar PV Systems.

performance_criteria.description: Use appropriate tools, equipment, and materials to install charge controllers
Identify the best location to mount charge controller
Install charge controller according to specifications and connection sequence
Apply safe working procedures in the selection and installation of charge controllers

learning_outcomes.description: Configure installed Charge Controller

performance_criteria.description: Configure charge controller to suit solar PV size according to specifications and manufacturer’s guidelines.
Configure Charge Controller to suite battery type, capacity and technology according to specifications and manufacturer’s guidelines.
Operate the charge controller according to specifications and manufacturer’s guidelines
Observe and take readings on the charge controller
Document the various readings taken

learning_outcomes.description: Install batteries in solar PV System.

performance_criteria.description: Describe the working principles of batteries
Explain the types and sizes of batteries and their applications in Solar PV installations
State the application of types of batteries
Discuss Solar PV batteries life span
Explain the importance of warranties in the installation of batteries
Select appropriate tools, equipment and materials used in the installation of batteries
Select appropriate PPE for the installation of batteries

learning_outcomes.description: Know battery installation in solar PV

performance_criteria.description: Identify battery polarities before installation
Explain how to handle batteries safely and appropriately
Carry out voltage measurements on batteries to confirm their status
Know how to install the battery according to: • Battery racks • Appropriate positioning in line with health and safety measures
Connect batteries in series/parallel in accordance with the voltage requirement of the inverter.
Install batteries to charge controller in accordance with specifications
Perform cable termination using cable lugs and torque in battery installation
Ensure appropriate temperature control environment

learning_outcomes.description: Understand Configuration of OBJECTIVE (LO) Solar PV battery

performance_criteria.description: Explain the need for series battery configuration
Explain the need for parallel Ref. Page battery configuration
Explain the need for series/ parallel combined battery configuration

learning_outcomes.description: Know the Protection in Solar PV battery installation

performance_criteria.description: Define Battery voltage Equalizer
State the importance of Battery voltage equalizer
Explain types of battery protection
Install battery fuses
Install battery circuit breaker
Ensure regular battery checks and maintenance

learning_outcomes.description: Understand Inverter in Solar PV Systems

performance_criteria.description: Define what is an Inverter
State types of inverters
Explain the principles of operation of an inverter
Sketch the inverter output wave form

learning_outcomes.description: Know Inverter size

performance_criteria.description: Carry out basic load analysis
Determine appropriate size and type of inverter
State safe working practices in the installation of inverters

learning_outcomes.description: Install inverters (LO)

performance_criteria.description: Apply safe working practices in the installation of inverters
Carry out inspection on suitable locations to install inverter
Determine appropriate location to install the inverter
Select appropriate tools, equipment and materials in the installation of inverter according to electrical load specifications
Select appropriate PPE for installing inverters in solar PV
Explain types of mounting • Wall mounting • Rack mounting

Prepare installation for wall mounting according to: • Determine suitable point on the wall • Mark out hole positions according to Inverter design • Drill holes on the Wall with suitable size bits • Select appropriate fisher and screws • Mount the inverter and fasten the screws to appropriate torque Ref. Page

Prepare installation for rack mounting to: • Ensure the rack is suitable for the PV system • Assemble the rack • Place the rack at appropriate position • Mount batteries at appropriate position • Connect batteries according to connection type • Confirm total battery voltage output is appropriate • Mount Inverter in appropriate position • Connect an Inverter DC terminals to battery terminals • Connect inverter AC side to load and mains supply • Ensure all fuses and circuit breakers are connected appropriately • Carry out appropriate test before switching • Switch on the inverter • Perform no-load test • Perform on-load test • Observe performance of the system
Apply safety and environmental standards in accordance with the manufacturer’s specifications and guidelines

learning_outcomes.description: Install Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) (LO)

performance_criteria.description: Apply safety and environmental standards in accordance with the manufacturer’s specifications Ref. Page and guidelines
Identify UPS terminals, ratings and settings
Carry out inspection on suitable locations on how to install UPS
Select appropriate tools, equipment and materials in the installation of UPS systems according to the electrical load specifications
Select appropriate location to install the UPS
Install UPS in accordance with the electrical load specifications

Prepare UPS installation according to specifications: • Carryout battery installation where applicable • Ensure all fuses and circuit breakers are connected appropriately • Carry out appropriate tests before switching • Switch on the UPS • Perform no-load test • Perform on-load test • Observe performance of the system

learning_outcomes.description: Distribute electrical load in a building

performance_criteria.description: Apply safety and environmental standards according to the laid down procedures
Explain the domestic / commercial/industrial electrical distribution systems: • Distribution board • Final circuits (socket, lighting, cooker, air conditioners etc.) • Earthing • Lightening arrestor
Identify final circuit (sub- circuits) to be connected to the inverter and or mains.
Explain the importance of electrical protective devices (EPDs) on loads in a building
Select appropriate distribution and protective devices in accordance with load specifications and regulations.
Carry out appropriate inspections and test

learning_outcomes.description: Know various electrical loads

performance_criteria.description: Identify DC loads
Identify AC resistive loads
Identify AC reactive loads
Ensure appropriate Inverter sizing for reactive loads
Determine the safe operating power for all electrical loads

learning_outcomes.description: Know the sources of battery charging and output power supply OBJECTIVE (LO)

performance_criteria.description: Apply safety measures in connection of inverter to the load and charging
Identify sources of battery charging to the PV system: • AC mains/Generator (through the inverter) • Solar PV Mains stand-alone charger
Locate power source point to feed the Inverter
Select appropriate miniature circuit breaker (MCB) to protect and feed the Inverter
Explain the importance of electrical protective devices (EPDs) on Inverter charging
Connect appropriate MCB to the Inverter output
Perform load and charging connections in accordance withthe guidelines and specifications

performance_criteria.description: Examine available sunlight used for energy generation
Perform calibration and dummy cell arrangements for final outlooks

learning_outcomes.description: Know Soldering Techniques

learning_outcomes.description: Know the procedure of Solar Panel Assembly (LO)

performance_criteria.description: Carry out Solar cells by padding
Perform trimming, cleaning, and aligning of cells prior to laying
Carry out soldering
Perform series and parallel cells connections
Assemble cells between protective calibrated layers
Test connected cells for optimal energy and power supply
Carryout termination of series connected cells into junction box
Perform connected cells lamination and encapsulation
Couple cell layered board with tempered glass and frame
Use durable of framed boards with water proof & weather proof sealing materials

learning_outcomes.description: Know testing and troubleshooting

performance_criteria.description: Carry out final test of functional connection and rate output
Perform quality inspection of cables connection to the bus outlet
Carry out check for electrical consistency and structural integrity

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to carryout post-assembly activities of Solar modules for optimal efficiency

performance_criteria.description: Document all procedures with detailed descriptions
